original_image_tags: The page shows multiple stamped impressions in blue and purple ink, primarily routing and receipt stamps from various FBI divisions and the U.S. Department of Justice, dated in August and September 1952. The stamps are oriented in different directions. The typed text from the reverse side is visible as a mirror image through the paper.

elements.description: The back of a typed document. Faint, reversed text from the front of the page is visible through the paper. Multiple blue ink stamps with dates from August and September 1952 are present, including text such as 'RECEIVED-HARBO', 'LABORATORY DIVISION', 'F.B.I.', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', and 'RECEIVED - NICHOLS'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of blue ink stamps from August and September 1952 and the reversed typed text, with Description B providing more specific stamp text details that do not contradict Description A.
